items.title: Language model pretraining (BERT, GPT)
items.description: Masked and causal language modeling on web-scale text learns contextual token representations that power search, classification, summarization, and chat after fine-tuning or prompting.

items.title: Vision encoder pretraining
items.description: Contrastive and rotation-based SSL on unlabeled images yields encoders that transfer to object detection, segmentation, and medical imaging with limited labeled data.

items.title: Multimodal alignment (CLIP-style)
items.description: Contrastive pretraining on image–caption pairs from the web aligns vision and language embeddings for zero-shot classification and retrieval without task-specific labels at pretrain time.

items.title: Speech and audio representation learning
items.description: Pretext tasks such as masked acoustic modeling or future-frame prediction learn speech encoders used for ASR fine-tuning, speaker ID, and audio search.

items.title: Low-label downstream adaptation
items.description: Teams pretrain self-supervised on in-house unlabeled logs or images, then fine-tune on small labeled sets — reducing annotation cost versus supervised-from-scratch training.
